title: Nice Mob Variants
description: Giving your game a whole bunch of new mob variants to check out.
body:
## 📖 Description **Nice Mob Variants** introduces a variety of new mob variants, enhancing the game’s diversity and making encounters feel more vibrant. The data pack also adds two new blocks: the Livestock Breeder and the Frog Feeder. ## 🐶 Mob Variants Overview ### Cat Variants
All Black with Green Eyes Spawns under the same conditions as the vanilla all black variant. ![all_black_green_eyes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/636103a14751c8a27a97ccdbee9a5fad7b2a89d0.png)
Creeper Spawns in Plains Villages. ![creeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd0449498e90a4434caa6456685b9a387bf8d5e7.png)
Embroidery Spawns in Archaeoligcal Site structures in Desert Biomes. ![embroidery](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10a5844fd9ce1a1c7df53d486df47998ef97b6c7.png)
Simba Spawns in Badland & Savanna Biomes. ![simba](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6dde829fba60cfd39d3239394f61fc00ec35070d.png)
Skeleton Spawns in Graveyard structures found in Dark Forest Biomes. Has also a chance to spawn instead of a vanilla Skeleton Horse Trap. Cannot be bred. ![skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ca4824c86cdb2d2e557487d2f26f42e5029a58d.png)
Soul Spawns in Monolith structures found in Soul Sand Valleys. ![soul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88ba5dd84790711e8f1b8753341acd5e8f48c21f.png)
Tiger Spawns in Badland & Savanna Biomes. ![tiger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ebc53450b75fdf45d7d0dd909e587ce311b7a14c.png)
### Chicken Variants
Cluckshroom Spawns in Fallen Mushroom structures generated in Mushroom Fields. ![cluckshroom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/288dfa556775ec44c1eb7f8915204dfb8476a062.png)
Creamy Spawns in the same biomes as the vanilla temperate variant. ![creamy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c9d1b2d88381784d5ea183ef10606700d97e843.png)
Dark Brown Spawns in Forest Biomes. ![dark_brown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/735793b17effd0c30b0d54995c849ffe626a4e54.png)
Duck Spawns in Swamp Biomes. Chickens renamed to "Benny" also become the Duck variant. ![duck](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/839d6bb686ee6a2c5f7299ffa21b50bb8bd70675.png)
Ender Spawns in End Farm structures generated in the End. Takes damage when in rain/water. Teleports when taking damage. ![ender](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17c0e99080d2ccb24ffaca7606b50ae764ee690e.png)
Flamingo Spawns in Beach Biomes. ![flamingo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b0f2010585d0fe17bba076fce94f084213360cc.png)
Golden Spawns in Villages & Savanna Biomes. ![golden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/430b035128bde32c5bf820c859ac6a074e92f87e.png)
Goose Spawns in Old Growth Spruce/Pine Taiga & Dark Forests. ![goose](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bab23ba4946ca47312b0ba521445236c150f2fbc.png)
Ostrich Spawns in warm Biomes like Savanna. ![ostrich](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f51a6cbf451b58c96b2d7b660d4d3ca16c916892.png)
Penguin Spawns in Snowy Beach Biomes. ![penguin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c6a928bcef9779fd0263210c19028c8d3a142fd.png)
Pigeon Spawns in Villages, Mansions & Pillager Outposts. ![pigeon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e2414aa5babaf43ad051803fcfb9c642c487166.png)
Potato Spawns in Potato Farm Structures. ![potato](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e403a1461d539dd44077eacd053d42ce2596c3f.png)
Rooster Spawns in Sunflower Plains & Flower Forests. Lays no eggs. Crows in the morning. ![rooster](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/525bc3bd1f04466ef42c08d2a82a934227250170.png)
Skeleton Spawns in Graveyard structures found in Dark Forest Biomes. Has also a chance to spawn instead of a vanilla Skeleton Horse Trap. Cannot be bred. Lays no eggs. ![skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5251fae1f8161a456aac7f4aca212b239c299080.png)
Strider Can only be found as a vehicle for Chicken Jockeys in the Nether. ![strider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e5c3cc313ca3fca16a5cfc6fc27fad329f48567.png)
Zombie Can only be found as vehicle for Chicken Jockeys outside the Nether. ![zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1fbd6caaf1078bd5d1ca53b291624e6224cdabaa.png)
### Cow Variants
Cold Yellow Spawns in the same biomes as Vanilla Cold variant. ![cold_yellow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bd7ee61a22adec907fea9a66cc4d84c7c244f90.png)
Cold Dark Spawns in the same Biomes as the Cold variant. ![cold_dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baf7b79f902848d463d073717faef408ceba1cb5.png)
Cold White Spawns in the same Biomes as the Cold variant. ![cold_white](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b782e7e0bfef8cf020c013404f88a3805e0edbfa.png)
Creamy Spawns in the same Biomes as the Temperate variant. ![creamy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3acbd0f2f8abab0ee66ede1e1500610debff0f8c.png)
Dark Spawns in the same Biomes as the Temperate variant. ![dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac2f648d168dd95f61d7d957ed014d064d83f7e8.png)
Ender Spawns in End Farm structures generated in the End. Takes damage when in rain/water. Teleports when taking damage. ![ender](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93d16e940c479bcb824d14f135ec820f6016d5b7.png)
Gray Spawns in the same Biomes as the Temperate variant. ![gray](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c6131f311a11e2265939561691b09f010b211e2.png)
Pink Moobloom Spawns in Sunflower Plains & Flower Forests. ![pink_moobloom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d571e7784a0fd95489706b3f8a397156ead6c5f.png)
Potato Spawns in Potato Farm Structures. ![potato](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd96bd37de247f52e5837f88a24e468aeb29b087.png)
Skeleton Spawns in Graveyard structures found in Dark Forest Biomes. Has also a chance to spawn instead of a vanilla Skeleton Horse Trap. Cannot be bred. ![skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3964c6dca35064f08d200b38ed442a682ec66739.png)
Sniffer Spawns in Sunflower Plains & Flower Forests. Drops Torchflower/Pitcher Plant. ![sniffer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0938f7947d22179bab64c1138ae4ef39ceead73d.png)
Wandering Trader Has a chance to spawn leashed to a Wandering Trader. ![wandering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1396de577890acf6ae1b25d7f241e60a296fa5c.png)
Warm Brown Spawns in the same Biomes as the vanilla Warm variant. ![warm_brown](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eee693a3e0b0b56b55ccd2195e3f695f68bd3843.png)
Warm Gray Spawns in the same Biomes as the vanilla Warm variant. ![warm_gray](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8454719d471de8000bd0f553e727186a68d47961.png)
Yellow Moobloom Spawns in Sunflower Plains & Flower Forests. ![yellow_moobloom](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8216516410799a6148b32cac79bb3144ff34649.png)
### Frog Variants
Dry Breedable in Desert Biomes. Drops Sand when eating. ![dry](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e7ae3f9117003c33a094a340ad4ecfd80ead65c.png)
Ender Spawns in End Farm structures generated in the End and can be bred in the End. Takes damage when in rain/water. Teleports when taking damage. Drops Crying Obsidian when eating. ![ender](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b00a5740826d16b4d8f8a5e80f990b10fbd718c6.png)
Frozen Can be bred in Ice Spike Biomes. Drops Ice when eating. ![frozen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1a680d59f4cde0479d5e60026993fb4cff6e81f.png)
Golden Breedable in Badland Biomes. Drops commonly Raw Gold or rarely Emeralds when eating. ![golden](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a84c08bdb8c52637e4c46dc07c5f0c6bd72f1146.png)
Guardian Breedable in Monuments. Drops Sea Lanterns when eating. ![guardian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19ad8786ec77ee90eb6f43ee25f13336e93dae37.png)
Muddy Spawns & is breedable in Mangrove Swamps. Drops Mud when eating. ![muddy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29d1070b675cdc0befda7efd04ae5acaea98078d.png)
Nether Spawns in Nether Well structures generated in Warped/Crimson Forests. Breedable in the Nether. Drops Shroomlights when eating ![nether](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c348fbf7fd23b3282194bca2687521f6d1cc15cb.png)
Sculk Breedable in Deep Dark Biomes. Drops Sculk when eating. ![sculk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f8c47dd9635682abb8cbca25c503bf935d95641f.png)
### Pig Variants
Creamy Spawns in the same biomes as temperate variant. ![creamy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/462dc0ceb79ecb87a29d0e413c6f7ed61879fa6f.png)
Dark Spawns in Forest biomes. ![dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96e70d6a6e6809143ad7d30b5f0f01dcc7d42d09.png)
Ender Spawns in End Farm structures generated in the End. Takes damage when in rain/water. Teleports when taking damage. ![ender](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c026119ed803390ddfd28f9410df594872e48f7.png)
Muddy Types Spawn in the same biomes as their normal counterparts. ![muddy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c6773d17d04af3b51ffe47de1218032598b0c78f.png)
Pale Spawns in the same biomes as temperate variant. ![pale](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99dd1f45c5f91be7c50f8d9138bd7d2ed63b0412.png)
Potato Spawns in Potato Farm Structures. ![potato](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47b1c1787a5e2dc07b230287408a712702347a49.png)
Skeleton Spawns in Graveyard structures found in Dark Forest Biomes. Has also a chance to spawn instead of a vanilla Skeleton Horse Trap. Cannot be bred. ![skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/487c88618e054c0f01304231f42d491ee6622aff.png)
Spotted Types Spawn in the same biomes as their normal counterparts. ![spotted](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18570eb5a908454ab82ef9a361a825245fab1b62.png)
Wandering Trader ![wandering](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0771150445f1329aa74e1206b56295c923129a6a.png)
Wild Spawns in Forest biomes. ![wild](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d6b38c148e80e6c1dedd8c2cb43f8f11fdd23c0.png)
### Wolf Variants
Black Spawns in Old Growth Pine Taiga Biomes. ![black](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4ceffe767285fc8b9380469437535e82fd90317.png)
Dark Spawns in Old Growth Pine Taiga Biomes. ![dark](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a493fc93f1a95b003ad190c63a775a2404caf77e.png)
Creaking Spawns in Pale Garden Biomes. ![pale](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63ae66249b49ed15e4941af28a649fb9bea0ea33.png)
Shiba Spawns in Hot Spring structures generated in Cherry Grove Biomes. ![shiba](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c23a903e13112974f5af18ed5f8874b1b352dc51.png)
Skeleton Spawns in Graveyard structures found in Dark Forest Biomes. Has also a chance to spawn instead of a vanilla Skeleton Horse Trap. Cannot be bred. ![skeleton](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a28260b4e600d99811424a40a6a7ef19509b003d.png)
Timber Spawns in Grove Biomes and Snowy Villages. ![timber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/09dd20b15f2bd3141b417a200f4243d518dba6ed.png)
White Black Spawns in Taiga Biomes. ![White Black](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/35ffbdbfcebf2c6a42cb1c64178f106c6ce7c13a.png)
### Zombie Nautilus
Cold Spawns in cold and frozen Biomes like Deep Frozen Ocean. ![cold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f8ff535e0e6a1f0837300f839c1bae671dd98ca.jpeg)
Guardian Spawns in the same biomes as Ocean Monuments generate. ![guardian](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b757c98bf84c99e85023061de54e75958d85624.png)
Husk Spawns in the same biomes as warm ocean ruins generate. Doesn't burn in sunlight. ![husk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95f701028764b0ab0231a32ee9faa08faae77d06.png)
Swamp Spawns in Swamp & Mangrove Swamp Biomes. ![swamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5aee4a1528444ab581b157aff76e00fb78470767.png)
## 🛠️ Technical Gibberish This data pack double functions as the **required** resource pack. So simply slap that one also into your Resource folder and make sure to enable it in game for the textures to show properly. _(This is not needed for the auto converted mod versions)_
## 📝 Translations Want to play in your own language? You can help us out by contributing on our **[Crowdin Page](https://crowdin.com/project/explorers-eden)**! Once a translation for a language is finished, it’ll be added to the data pack for you to enjoy.
## ✍️ Feedback, Questions & Suggestions We're here to help! If you happen to have questions, suggestions or just encountered a bug, then feel free to hop on our discord server to ask for help in our **Data Pack Section**. [Click to join the server](https://discord.gg/f2pMggfgVv)
## 🎮 Explorer's Eden SMP Join **[A Realm Recrafted](https://modrinth.com/server/a-realm-recrafted)**, our Minecraft SMP! Enjoy a world featuring all of our (actively maintained) data packs, as well as some exclusive ones. It’s completely free without any microtransactions. Come build, explore, and craft with us today!
